title: Scaled Garden Figure Dramatic Garment
sourceTitle: Scaled Garden Midjourney Prompt Figure Dramatic Garment
prompt: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT] walking away from camera through [REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING] where [PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT] has been scaled to architectural enormity — stems rising 6 meters as living columns, [BLOOM/FORM] canopying overhead. Figure's [GARMENT] and flora unified in [COLOR1] color family. [COLOR2] as the contrasting landscape — sky, soil, or hills — grounding the impossible scale in documentary photographic realism. Shot on Phase One XF IQ4 150MP, natural daylight, no artificial lighting. --v 8.1
originalPrompt: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT] walking away from camera through [REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING] where [PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT] has been scaled to architectural enormity — stems rising 6 meters as living columns, [BLOOM/FORM] canopying overhead. Figure's [GARMENT] and flora unified in [COLOR1] color family. [COLOR2] as the contrasting landscape — sky, soil, or hills — grounding the impossible scale in documentary photographic realism. Shot on Phase One XF IQ4 150MP, natural daylight, no artificial lighting. --v 8.1

promptTranslations.zh: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT] 背对镜头穿过[REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING]，其中[PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT]被放大到建筑级巨型——茎高达6米，如同活柱，[BLOOM/FORM]在上方形成树荫。人物的[GARMENT]与植被统一为[COLOR1]色系。[COLOR2]作为对比景观——天空、土壤或山丘——以纪实摄影的现实感扎根于这不可能的比例。使用Phase One XF IQ4 150MP拍摄，自然日光，无人工光。--v 8.1
promptTranslations.fr: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT] s’éloignant de la caméra à travers [REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING] où [PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT] a été agrandi à une énormité architecturale — tiges s’élevant à 6 mètres comme des colonnes vivantes, [BLOOM/FORM] formant un dais au-dessus. La [GARMENT] de la figure et la flore unies dans une famille de couleurs [COLOR1]. [COLOR2] comme paysage contrastant — ciel, sol ou collines — ancrant l’échelle impossible dans un réalisme photographique documentaire. Prise avec Phase One XF IQ4 150MP, lumière naturelle du jour, sans éclairage artificiel. --v 8.1
promptTranslations.ru: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT] идет спиной к камере через [REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING], где [PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT] увеличен до архитектурных масштабов — стебли достигают 6 метров в высоту, образуя живые колонны, [BLOOM/FORM] нависает сверху. Образ [GARMENT] и флора объединены в одной цветовой гамме [COLOR1]. [COLOR2] — в роли контрастного ландшафта — небо, почва или холмы, создающие зарядку невозможного масштаба в документальном фотореализме. Снято на Phase One XF IQ4 150MP, естественный дневной свет, без искусственного освещения. --v 8.1
promptTranslations.pt: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT] caminhando para longe da câmera através de [REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING] onde [PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT] foi ampliado a uma enormidade arquitetônica — hastes que sobem 6 metros como colunas vivas, [BLOOM/FORM] formando dossel acima. O [GARMENT] da figura e a flora unificados em família de cores [COLOR1]. [COLOR2] como a paisagem contrastante — céu, solo ou colinas — ancorando a escala impossível no realismo fotográfico documental. Fotografia feita com Phase One XF IQ4 150MP, luz natural do dia, sem iluminação artificial. --v 8.1
promptTranslations.ja: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT]がカメラから離れて歩く、[REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING]の中を通り抜ける。[PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT]の植物が建築的な巨大さにスケールアップされており、茎が6メートルの高さの生きた柱となり、[BLOOM/FORM]が頭上にキャノピーのように広がっている。人物の[GARMENT]と植物が[COLOR1]の色調に統一されている。[COLOR2]が対照的な風景として機能し、空、土壌または丘が不可能なスケールを写実的なドキュメンタリー写真のリアリズムで支えている。Phase One XF IQ4 150MPで撮影、自然光、人工照明なし。--v 8.1
promptTranslations.ko: [FIGURE IN DRAMATIC GARMENT]가 카메라에서 멀어지며 [REAL LANDSCAPE SETTING]를 지나가는데, [PLANT OR NATURAL ELEMENT]이 건축적 거대함으로 확장됨 — 줄기들이 6미터 높이의 살아있는 기둥처럼 솟아오르고, [BLOOM/FORM]가 머리 위를 덮음. 인물의 [GARMENT]와 식물이 [COLOR1] 색상군으로 통일됨. [COLOR2]는 대조적인 풍경 — 하늘, 토양, 또는 언덕 — 으로서 불가능한 스케일을 다큐멘터리 사진적 현실감으로 견고하게 다짐. Phase One XF IQ4 150MP 카메라로 촬영, 자연광, 인공 조명 없음. --v 8.1
